name: activity-feed
description: Universal cross-blueprint activity feed renderer. ActivityFeed.render(dv, opts) — time-windowed query (today/week/month) across the canonical type:/created_at: vocab shipped FA-1..FA-7. Renders via customJS.BeaconCards. Materialized on cowork Daily/Weekly/Monthly hubs + NEW Today.md landing surface (FA-9a, v0.62.0). v0.1.1 PATCH (v0.64.0): two additive render-opts — asOf (anchor time window to a specific date, default now) + includeMtime (OR file.mtime into the time-window predicate, catching edited-not-just-created notes). Backwards-compatible — existing callers passing no new opts get v0.1.0 behavior unchanged. Consumed by daily@0.5.0 SpaceDailyDashboard activity panel. v0.1.2 PATCH (v0.64.2): three additive render-opts. getTitle (function (p) → string) — override BeaconCards' default title resolver (`p.file.name`); use for prettier display when filenames are opaque (timestamp-based scratches etc.). collapsible (boolean, default false) — when true AND groupBy=blueprint, each group wraps in `<details>`/`<summary>` (closed by default; summary shows blueprint name + count). colorByType (object `{[type]: cssColor}`) — when collapsible is true, each `<details>` gets `border-left: 4px solid <color>`; unknown types fall back to `var(--color-base-50)`. All three opts are additive; existing callers (cowork Daily/Weekly/Monthly Hub + Today.md) keep their v0.1.0/v0.1.1 behavior unchanged. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.65.0): _DEFAULT_BLUEPRINTS widened with 6 cowork run-note types (cowork-morning-briefing, cowork-midday-tripwire, cowork-eod-review, cowork-finance-snapshot, cowork-weekly-review, cowork-monthly-review). v0.3.0 MINOR (v0.66.0): three additive render-opts. rollUpRoots[] coalesces descendant edits under a root file (e.g., project tasks → project hub) into a single synthetic page; rules: {type, childMatch, rootPath, exclude?}. flatGrouped:true (when groupBy='blueprint') renders sections as muted uppercase headers with colored dots in place of nested <details>; one-tap reveal at the outer-section level only. metaBuilder:(page, parentEl)=>void delegates per-card meta rendering to the caller via BeaconCards' v0.2.6 function-form meta opt. All three opts additive; v0.1.x/v0.2.x callers keep prior behavior unchanged. depends_on cards bumped >=0.2.5 → >=0.2.6. v0.3.1 PATCH (v0.66.1): rollup synthetic page now copies `name` from root in addition to `title` — projects use `name:` frontmatter, not `title:`, and downstream resolvers like SpaceDailyDashboard._resolveTitle need `name` to surface a meaningful card title instead of the literal filename.
